# Project Zomboid - Item Script Parameters

Comprehensive list of all 373 item properties found in vanilla scripts.

## Table of Contents

- [Boolean Flags](#boolean-flags)
- [Numeric Properties](#numeric-properties)
- [String Properties](#string-properties)

Total: 80 properties

### BreakSound
